ddls:
CREATE TABLE "analysis_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis step */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the analysis sequence */,
  "is_consistent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the step produced consistent results */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the step's output */,
  "minimum_threshold" REAL /* Minimum threshold used during this step */,
  "iterations" INTEGER /* Number of iterations performed in this step */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute this step (in seconds) */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the analysis step */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated by the analysis step */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for this analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., data science, marketing) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user (e.g., data science team, marketing team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_steps" (
  "model_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-step association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this step */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis step linked to this model */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the model execution (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_steps_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES analysis_steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_steps_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for generating the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., pdf, csv, html) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the user is collaborating with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, contributor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
